comment: Synthetic metastatic CRC, 64M, ECOG 1, right-sided cecal primary, KRAS exon 2 G12V mutated (RAS-mutant excludes anti-EGFR per PRIME post-hoc), BRAF-WT, MSS. Engine routes ALGO-CRC-METASTATIC-1L step 1 (no MSI-H) → step 2 (RF-CRC-RAS-WT does NOT fire because kras_mutation=true) → step 3 (no BRAF V600E) → step 4 (no frailty) → if_false default = IND-CRC-METASTATIC-1L-FOLFOX-BEV (FOLFOX + bevacizumab, NO16966/CALGB-80405 RAS-mut analysis). RF-CRC-RAS-MUTANT also fires (de-escalate direction = anti-EGFR removed from option set) but does not branch the algorithm. Right-sided + RAS-mut canonical bev+chemo target population.
